# NodeAttribute.ParamPlus12 property

The distinct value at specifier `+12` (verified: `MaximumDominance` → 11, `EarthquakeDuration` → 1031902). Exposed raw so the consumer never re-parses the specifier.

public int ParamPlus12 { get; set; }
